lessons.title: Web Research Skills
lessons.description: Learn Web Research Skills with focused discussion, examples, activity, and a 5-item quiz.
objectives: Understand key ideas in Web Research Skills
Answer quiz items with evidence-based reasoning

sections.heading: Introduction
sections.content: This lesson introduces Web Research Skills for Grade 9 ICT.

sections.heading: Main Discussion
sections.content: You will analyze key concepts, examples, and practical applications of Web Research Skills.

sections.heading: Visual/Animated Explanation
sections.content: Visual guide for Web Research Skills.

sections.heading: Guided Examples
items: Identify key ideas in Web Research Skills.
Connect the concept to real life.

sections.heading: Summary
sections.content: This lesson on Web Research Skills covered the key ideas, examples, activity, and quiz feedback.

activity.instruction: Arrange the process for Web Research Skills.

quiz.question: What is a key focus in Web Research Skills?
choices: Understanding the concept and applying it
quiz.answer: Understanding the concept and applying it
quiz.explanation: This lesson emphasizes understanding and application.

quiz.question: Why are guided examples important?
quiz.explanation: Examples model correct thinking and process.

quiz.question: True or False: Feedback helps improve answers.
What should you do after answering a question?

lessons.depedNote: Sample content inspired by selected DepEd competencies for Grade 9 ICT.
